'''Sartar''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who directed the development of [[Fire-Rain 3]], a deadly bio-agent. The chemical weapon was developed at [[supply depot I-389]], located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Sartar had planned to test his new weapon on the inhabitants of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] and [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], but was foiled when a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agents managed to destroy all samples of the bio-agent, along with Sartar's laboratory.

Sartar was also one of the few Humans who could speak [[Ithorese/Legends|Ithorese]].
